figures.caption: Figure 1: Left: Assignment of displacement boundary conditions. A continuous displacement field (represented by blue streamlines) is evaluated at the boundary nodes of the voxelized domain to prescribe Dirichlet boundary conditions (red vectors). Right: A close-up highlights the local operator tiling geometries during inference.

Figure 2: NEST vs. FEM on unseen macro-scale test geometries. The test set contains two SimJEB jet-engine brackets and two TPMS structures, voxelized at multiple resolutions, here shown at n = 60. NEST is trained only on random 3× 3× 3 local patches and is not fine-tuned on these geometries.
